SudokuGenerator - Class in com.sudoku.service
Generates complete Sudoku boards using backtracking.

SudokuSolver - Class in com.sudoku.service
Solves a Sudoku board using recursive backtracking.

Validates if a move is correct according to Sudoku rules.
